note: Highest-accuracy multimodal Nova at launch; workhorse mid/high tier for complex text, image and video tasks before Premier arrived.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: Dec 3, 2024 re:Invent launch corroborated by multiple press sources. Confirmed 300K multimodal context, 200-language support, $0.80/$3.20 per M pricing (AWS Nova pricing/docs). All 9 benchmark rows (MMLU 85.9, GPQA 46.9, MATH 76.6, HumanEval 89.0, GSM8K 94.8, BBH 86.9, IFEval 92.1, DROP 85.4, ARC-Challenge 94.8) confirmed to literally appear on deepranking.ai/llm-models/nova-pro. No changes made.
